market.title: 2028 U.S. Presidential Election Winner
market.resolutionNote: Resolves to whoever is inaugurated President in January 2029, based on AP/Fox/NBC race calls.

marketBrief.text: Vance's odds have drifted down through 2026 after peaking near 33% last October, and he's now running roughly even with Marco Rubio in the high-teens on both platforms. The move tracks a run of soft approval numbers and reporting on private doubts within Trump's circle about Vance leading the MAGA coalition. Gavin Newsom has been the main beneficiary on the Democratic side, closing the gap with the highest trading volume of any non-Vance candidate.
marketBrief.author: Owain Flanders
